full_text:
Jinhuansanjie 金環三結
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jinhuansanjie (金環三結). An officer of Meng Huo, he died fighting the Shu army during their attack. Jinhuansanjie is a fictional character. Jinhuansanjie was affiliated with Nanman.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
